signatureMove.name: Grovel, Peasant!
signatureMove.extraText: This attack deals +1 Dmg to Goblins. Reduce all Dmg suffered from Goblins to {Null}.

abilities.name: Weakling
abilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

abilities.name: Sceptre of Almighty Power
abilities.description: If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg dealt to {Null}. If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

abilities.name: Royal Privilege
abilities.description: Whenever this character would suffer Dmg, you may have a friendly Goblin within 4" and LoS suffer all that Dmg instead.

abilities.name: Rule the Roost
abilities.description: Target Goblin suffers 2 Wds, gains 2 energy and activates immediately (this character's activation ends). If the target has already activated, then this is a bonus activation; otherwise this counts as the target's activation for the turn.

abilities.name: Gimme!
abilities.description: Gain possession of one Moonstone carried by target friendly Goblin.
